name: API to MCP Converter
tagline: Turn any REST API into an MCP server in 30 seconds
description: Convert any REST API into an MCP server in seconds. Upload your OpenAPI spec and get a hosted MCP endpoint. Perfect for AI agents that need to connect to existing APIs.
features: MCP protocol compatibility (Claude, Codex, Cursor, Cline)
target_users: Backend developers with existing REST APIs
